evals.prompt: 帮我把这个页面部署一下，想让同一个 Wi-Fi 下的手机也能打开。页面会用摄像头。
evals.expected_output: The agent should use the LAN deploy workflow, choose HTTPS because camera access is needed, check ports before launch, ask before killing occupied ports, and return an IP-based HTTPS URL.

evals.prompt: Please start /demo so another laptop on my local network can visit it. It does not use camera or microphone.
evals.expected_output: The agent should deploy the /demo route over LAN, prefer HTTP unless the project requires HTTPS, use the default frontend/backend ports when available, and report local plus LAN URLs.

evals.prompt: 3001 好像被之前的服务占了。帮我重新部署这个页面。
evals.expected_output: The agent should inspect the listener on port 3001, show PID/command, ask before killing it, and only stop the exact process after confirmation.
